nodes.norm_label: skylex database control plane — development plan

nodes.label: Skylex
nodes.rationale: Open, self-hosted database control plane that makes running production-grade databases as simple as using a managed DBaaS while keeping data on the user's own infrastructure.

nodes.label: Point-in-Time Recovery (PITR)
nodes.rationale: Enabled by default for production; relies on continuous WAL archiving plus scheduled base backups.

nodes.label: pgBackRest
nodes.rationale: Chosen as the backup engine because it is mature, feature-complete, and proven for PostgreSQL PITR.

nodes.label: Embedded SQLite
nodes.rationale: Default metadata store to keep the server a single binary; external PostgreSQL HA mode added later.

nodes.label: Frontend Stack (Vite + React Router 7 + Tailwind CSS)
nodes.rationale: Selected for the Skylex UI because a Vite + React Router 7 + Tailwind CSS scaffold already exists in ui/.
nodes.norm_label: frontend stack (vite + react router 7 + tailwind css)

nodes.label: Docker Compose
nodes.rationale: Primary reference deployment target because it provides the fastest onboarding for single-organization users.

nodes.label: Single Organization Tenancy
nodes.rationale: MVP targets a single organization for a simpler auth model; multi-tenant SaaS-style isolation is out of scope.
